title: Nice Babies Eyes
description: This Resource Pack is changing the eyes of every single Baby to Old after snapshot 26.1 (2)
body:
![Babies eyes and softer chick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a74a5d66107cc5e978bbbb930f66c830afd5233.png)This resource pack updates the eyes of every single baby after snapshot 26.1 (2) to old nice ones.

Eyed:
- WolvesрЯРЇ
- CowsрЯРЃ
- Cats/OcelotsрЯР±
- SheepsрЯРС
- PigsрЯРЈ
- FoxesрЯ¶К
- Donkeys/MulesрЯЂП(I cut out the pixels that, due to an error, created the effect of stilts on the legs)
- Baby Bees no longer look like hairy menрЯРЭ
- Baby Bears with nice mouthsрЯРївАНвЭДпЄП
- Baby Llamas without eyes on their foreheadsрЯ¶Щ
- Striders is betterрЯСє

And: The chicksрЯР• are less contrasting

If you don't need all the textures in the resource pack, simply delete the ones you don't need after downloading. You can edit and do whatever you want with itвШЇпЄП

## # Ru
–≠—В–Њ—В –†–µ—Б—Г—А—Б–њ–∞–Ї –Њ–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—П–µ—В –≥–ї–∞–Ј–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е –Љ–∞–ї—Л—И–µ–є –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ –≤–µ—А—Б–Є–Є 26.1 (2) –і–Њ —Б—В–∞—А—Л—Е –љ–Њ—А–Љ–Є—Б–љ—Л—Е.

- –Я—З—С–ї—Л —В–µ–њ–µ—А—М –љ–µ –њ–Њ—Е–Њ–ґ–Є –љ–∞ –≤–Њ–ї–Њ—Б–∞—В—Л—Е –Љ—Г–ґ–Є–Ї–Њ–≤рЯРЭ

–Х—Б–ї–Є –≤–∞–Љ –љ—Г–ґ–љ—Л –љ–µ –≤—Б–µ —В–µ–Ї—Б—В—Г—А—Л —А–µ—Б—Г—А—Б–њ–∞–Ї–∞, —В–Њ –њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ —Г–і–∞–ї–Є—В–µ –љ–µ–љ—Г–ґ–љ—Л–µ –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ –Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–Є. –Т—Л –Љ–Њ–ґ–µ—В–µ –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ—П—В—М –Є –і–µ–ї–∞—В—М —Б –љ–Є–Љ —З—В–Њ —Е–Њ—В–Є—В–µвШЇпЄП
